parents.subject: LU-18248 tests: allow LRU lock margin in sanity/425

commit.subject: LU-19816 tests: add fast_file_write to sanity.sh
commit.message:
LU-19816 tests: add fast_file_write to sanity.sh

fast_file_write will use fallocate to consume space if available,
otherwide dd is used, which is slower.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity.sh env=ONLY="413 116a 27m"
Change-Id: Ibb8b35fbd0ac21d25e34224c0618c94764d8f3a8
Signed-off-by: Frederick Dilger <fdilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63528
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
